items.title: 'Everest Man' and 'Mountain Queen' break own records scaling world's tallest peak
items.dek: Kami Rita Sherpa and Lakpa Sherpa summited Everest for the 32nd and 11th time, respectively.
items.body: Kami Rita Sherpa and Lakpa Sherpa summited Everest for the 32nd and 11th time, respectively.

items.title: Taiwan will not provoke conflict nor give up sovereignty, says president
items.dek: Lai Ching-te made his first direct response to Trump and Xi's meeting where they discussed Taiwan independence.
items.body: Lai Ching-te made his first direct response to Trump and Xi's meeting where they discussed Taiwan independence.
